info.title: $SITE_NAME Contact Action
info.description: Machine-readable description of the public contact inquiry action used by $SITE_DOMAIN.
info.x-ai-instructions: Use this action to submit a public project inquiry. Collect name, email, and a message describing the business context and desired outcome before calling. Submissions are not idempotent; call once per user intent.

servers.description: Form processor used by the public contact form.

post.description: Submits a public project inquiry from $SITE_DOMAIN.

access_key.description: Public form-processor access key included in the site contact form.

message.description: Business context, friction, and desired outcome.

subject.description: Email subject used by the form processor.

from_name.description: Display source name for the form processor.

redirect.description: Return URL after a successful submission.

botcheck.description: Hidden anti-bot honeypot. Human submissions leave this empty.

400.description: Submission rejected because required fields were missing or invalid.
